title: High Commander
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Commander}}
The term '''High Commander''' was used to describe very senior officers in the Imperial Military hierarchy.

In an [[Oversector/Legends|Oversector]], the title of "Priority Sector High Commander" was given to the senior military officer, normally the [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] himself.

[[DarkValor]] held this position.<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref> Grand Moff [[Kintaro]] ruled as the Imperial Oversector High Commander of the [[Sarin Oversector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Imp-stub}}
